evidence: Disease prevalence differs strongly by source site.
recommendation: Report site-stratified metrics; consider leave-one-site-out validation.

evidence: ca, thal, slope, and cholesterol missing/zero patterns vary by cohort.
recommendation: Fit preprocessing inside CV folds and avoid using missingness to claim transportable physiology without site validation.

evidence: ca and thal are downstream diagnostic/procedure-like fields relative to simple screening use cases.
recommendation: Define intended prediction time; test models with and without procedure-adjacent predictors.

evidence: Records from all sites mixed into random folds can reward cohort recognition.
recommendation: Use stratified CV as a baseline and site-held-out validation for external generalization.
